basic_details.short_information: ANGRAU has been announced for 1 Research Associate post for eligible Ph.D. or M.Sc. (Ag.) with NET qualified candidates. The walk-in interview will be held on 09 June 2026 for recruitment at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU). Check eligibility, salary, selection process, and interview details here.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. (Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding), M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding with NET qualified

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. Rs.61,000/- + HRA - Rs.67,000/- + HRA Per Month
